headline: MSCI poised to benefit from AI and systematic investing trends, Wells Fargo says
summary: Investing.com -- Wells Fargo has upgraded MSCI to “Overweight” from “Equal Weight,” raising its price target to $700 from $650, citing accelerating demand for data-driven investment strategies and growing opportunities tied to artificial intelligence.

headline: Wells Fargo Upgrades MSCI to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $700
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Haas   upgrades MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) from Equal-Weight to Overweight and raises the price target from $650 to $700.
